subject: Re:
body:
use the conference room at my office,  move the model.  I'll confirmm.. IT cannot be used when I am there so we will find an alternative


----- Original Message ----
From: John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, January 15, 2007 4:57:53 PM
Subject: RE: 

I am sending this via my new address which is john_amerling@earthlink.net. I
understand the priorities and I am working on them. I am more or less out of
the old office so it is important that I have some place to land tomorrow
where I can work in privacy for you full time. I am going to park at a
friend's office at 7 AM tomorrow morning. It is in the east end and I will
have my cell on which is 340 690-7194. As luck would have it my home phone
is out, but the phone in the apartment at our house is 340 714-7674 where
messages can be left. 

-----Original Message-----
From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Monday, January 15, 2007 4:16 PM
To: John Amerling
Subject: 

did you get a new  e.mail address.. issues,,cisterns, dock, , power, beach
sand , barges, shed location.
